items.title: Victim of violent robbery describes attackers as 'pure evil'

children.content: In a statement from hospital, the 76-year-old victim of a violent robbery on Tasmania's east coast says he was looking at weather charts when he was suddenly attacked.

items.title: Electoral boundary shakeup leaves politicians with a big decision

children.content: Some notable politicians are among the 114,000 Tasmanians displaced by electoral boundary changes, and now have a difficult decision to make — stick with the electorate that voted them in, or move with the communities they've long been aligned with and live in.

image.altText: Hon Rebecca White MP

items.title: Electoral boundary changes to affect more than 100,000 Tasmanians

children.content: More than a quarter of Tasmanians will vote in new electorates under a long-awaited boundary redistribution announced by the Australian Electoral Commission.

image.altText: Purple voting centre sign with people walking side

items.title: LGH almost full as patients told not to come unless its an emergency

children.content: Tasmania's top health official says it will take the Launceston General Hospital "two or three days" to bring its services back to an acceptable level, after it issued a notice urging patients to only attend if it is a medical emergency.

image.altText: Exteriors of a public hospital.

items.title: Developer proposes turning Boag's Brewery site into hotel, offices and public space

children.content: The Tasmanian government wants to buy Launceston's Boag's Brewery site and says it has "in-principle" support from the Japanese parent company to explore the idea. A developer says the site could be redeveloped into a mix of commercial properties, a boutique hotel, large public open spaces, offices and car parking.

image.altText: An artistic render of Boag's Brewery showing a hotel.

items.title: New owner of Rushy Lagoon reveals plans for Tasmania's largest farm

children.content: The buyer of Tasmania's largest farm says in addition to the pine plantation it has planned for the property, it's also considering cropping and leasing out parts of the farm for grazing, tourism and mountain biking.

gallery.altText: Beef cattle graze in a lush green field, with background fog obscuring the hills.

thumbnail.altText: Beef cattle graze in a lush green field, with background fog obscuring the hills.

items.title: Disgraced footballer Nicky Winmar removed from AFL Hall of Fame

children.content: Winmar was found guilty earlier this month of three counts of unlawful assault and common law assault.

gallery.altText: Nicky wearing a grey coat and sunglasses.

thumbnail.altText: Nicky wearing a grey coat and sunglasses.

items.title: Police investigate attempted sexual assault of Melbourne dog walkers

children.content: Police are investigating after two women reported that a man attempted to assault them before the dogs they were walking chased him away.

image.altText: Dogs chasing a man along a creek

items.title: An alias and a dead man's name: Former ATO executive charged with fraud

children.content: Former assistant tax commissioner Nick Petroulias has been charged with multiple fraud offences, accused of obtaining financial advantage by deception and using false documents.

image.altText: A man's profiled outside a brick building.

items.title: Ex-Sydney church turned LGBT nightclub ordered to 'cease offensive trading'

items.title: Trump reverses temporary pause on traffic stops after recent fatal shootings

children.content: US President Donald Trump says federal immigration agents will continue carrying out vehicle stops, reversing a temporary pause announced by officials just a day earlier.

items.title: Diarrhoea-inducing Cyclospora outbreak spreads across US

children.content: The US CDC is investigating thousands of possible cases across 34 states, as officials track down the source of the outbreak.

image.altText: A lot of small lettuce plants growing in a green house.

items.title: 'They hate us and we hate them': England-Argentina semi will come with extra feeling

children.content: It is one of the biggest rivalries in men's World Cup history, and while the teams may downplay the history, England and Argentina fans are ready for another iconic showdown.

articles.title: Why the England-Argentina rivalry is one of the ugliest in football

children.content: England's World Cup semifinal clash against Argentina is the latest chapter in a sporting rivalry that dates back 60 years to an ill-tempered quarterfinal, featuring cheating, violence and redemption.

image.altText: Diego Maradona screams

articles.title: France falters at first real hurdle as superstars fail to shine

children.content: France's 2026 World Cup campaign is ended by a poor 2-0 defeat to Spain, as the much-hyped collection of star forwards fail to turn up for the biggest game yet.

image.altText: Desire Doue pulls his jersey over his face in disappointment

items.title: Moira Deeming drops court bid against party after last-ditch plea to retain candidacy

items.title: New Zealand reports first H5N1 bird flu case

items.title: Children had to use toilet in front of others in police watchhouse, tribunal told

children.content: Advocates for young people say conditions in a Queensland watch house have not improved since three teenagers' human rights were breached. A tribunal heard the boys had limited privacy and had to use the toilet in front of others.

items.title: Darwin man busted with 110,000 cigarettes, 330kg of tobacco pleads guilty

children.content: A Darwin tobacconist has pleaded guilty to tax evasion after police busted him with more than 330 kilograms of tobacco labelled as Chinese tea and 110,000 illegally imported cigarettes.

items.title: Bid to make daylight saving time permanent passes US house

items.title: Truck driver's sacking for $100k ice cream bungle was fair, finds commission

children.content: The Fair Work Commission rules a trucking company was within its rights to fire a driver after he set the temperature of his trailer full of ice cream more than 20 degrees too warm.
